title: agropyron sepium
intro: Agropyron sepium, also known as sweet bent or meadow grass, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agropyron sepium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
